title: cyperus tenuifolius var. tenuifolius
intro: Cyperus tenuifolius var. tenuifolius, also known as the slender flatsedge or narrow-leaved flatsedge, is a plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Cyperus tenuifolius var. tenuifolius include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in salves and poultices for topical applications.
